goal: Remove the misplaced tarot-card-meanings/th/ directory tree that was an artifact of a one-off typo during the legacy *-tarot-meaning stub generation
done: rm -rf tarot-card-meanings/th/ — removed the entire stray subtree, which contained exactly one file: tarot-card-meanings/th/tarot-card-meanings/four-of-cups-tarot-meaning/index.html (an 869-byte meta-refresh redirect stub pointing to /th/cards/four-of-cups/, noindex,follow, with Thai 'หน้านี้ถูกย้ายแล้ว' body text). The legitimate equivalent at th/tarot-card-meanings/four-of-cups-tarot-meaning/index.html (1628 bytes) is untouched and verified present
root_cause: One-off typo during the legacy stub generation script — author wrote to tarot-card-meanings/th/tarot-card-meanings/four-of-cups-tarot-meaning/ instead of th/tarot-card-meanings/four-of-cups-tarot-meaning/. Only four-of-cups got misplaced; the other 77 cards went to the correct path. Surfaced during the earlier sitemap-diagnosis pass (2026-05-20) as 'stray nested tarot-card-meanings/th/ dir' in the SEO backlog
fix: Single rm -rf of the stray parent directory. No code or sitemap changes needed — the stray was never referenced from anywhere (no internal links, not in sitemap.xml, not in any JS routing table). Effectively dead bytes in the deploy artifact
notes: Safe to delete because: (a) sitemap.xml contains no reference to the stray path; (b) no internal HTML link in the repo points at it (the legacy stub tree is reachable only from external backlinks pointing at the canonical /tarot-card-meanings/[slug]-tarot-meaning/ form, never at the doubly-nested form); (c) Cloudflare Pages will simply 404 the misplaced URL after deploy, but no one was hitting it. Cleanup, not a fix.
